test_name: December 2024 US Form A SAT Math Module 2
passage: The function g is defined by g(x)= -18- 9x. For what value of x does g(x)=-216?

test_name: December 2024 US Form A SAT Math Module 2
passage: The population of a certain city doubled every 25 years from 1660 to 1760. The population of this city was 208,000 in 1760. What was the population of this city in 1660?

test_name: December 2024 US Form A SAT Math Module 2
passage: The function $f(x)=600(0.5)^{\frac{x}{11}}$ gives the predicted intensity of a beam f(x), in number of photons in the beam, x millimeters below the surface of a certain material. What is the bestinterpretation of f(11)= 300?

choices.label: A
choices.text: A beam at the surface of the material has a predicted intensity of 11 photons in the beam.

choices.label: B
choices.text: A beam at the surface of the material has a predicted intensity of 300 photons in the beam.

choices.label: C
choices.text: A beam 11 millimeters below the surface of the material has a predicted intensity of 300 photons in the beam.

choices.label: D
choices.text: A beam 300 millimeters below the surface of the material has a predicted intensity of 600 photons in the beam.

passage: A computer program models the population of a certain insect in an environment where theinsect has no natural predators.
